title: AMI ES2002a kickoff and project brief
expected_context: This is a project kickoff meeting.
The team is designing a new remote control.
The remote control brief is to be original, trendy, and user friendly.
The project has three design stages.
The process includes individual work followed by a meeting, repeated three times.
The participants introduce themselves and their roles.
expected_in_meeting_activities: The group begins a whiteboard exercise.
Participants are asked to draw their favorite animal and summarize its characteristics.
The Marketing Expert volunteers to go first.
The Marketing Expert discusses a beagle.
The User Interface Designer discusses a monkey.
acceptable_behavior: Summarize the kickoff context and project brief.
Treat the favorite-animal discussion as an in-meeting exercise, not as a business action item.
Leave decisions, action items, owners, deadlines, risks, and open questions empty or none-equivalent.
must_not_invent: Customer requirements beyond original, trendy, and user friendly
Future work not stated in the first five-minute clip
